headline: Analyst Trims Price Target on Entergy (ETR). Here is Why
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is an integrated US energy company that provides electricity to more than 3 million utility customers in Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Texas. On June 10, BMO Capital lowered its price target on Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) from […]
